title: Earthy Flaky German Peanut Crumble
description: A kid-friendly and low-carb friendly dish featuring earthy flavors with a touch of nuttiness from peanut oil. Perfect for breakfast or as a snack.
instructions: Heat peanut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add almonds and pumpkin seeds to the pan, stirring occasionally until lightly toasted, about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Grate ginger root using a microplane or box grater.
In a separate bowl, combine cooled nuts, coconut flakes, grated ginger, and honey. Slowly add water while mixing to create a crumble-like consistency.
Press mixture into the bottom of an 8x8 inch baking dish.
Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown on top.
